channel.title: Startup on Dario Di Pasquale
channel.description: Recent content in Startup on Dario Di Pasquale

item.title: Fractional CTO: What It Is, How It Works, and When It Beats Hiring a Full-Time CTO
item.description: A practical and personal view on what a fractional CTO does, how the model works, and when it is smarter than hiring a full-time CTO too early.
